piano.clue: large keyboard instrument with black and white keys

guitar.clue: string instrument usually played with a pick or fingers

drum.clue: percussion instrument hit with sticks or hands

flute.clue: woodwind instrument played by blowing across a hole

violin.clue: string instrument played with a bow, held under the chin

trumpet.clue: brass instrument with three valves and a bright sound

saxophone.clue: brass-bodied woodwind instrument common in jazz

harp.clue: large triangular string instrument played with fingers

banjo.clue: string instrument with a circular body and a unique twang

accordion.clue: portable instrument with bellows and keys or buttons

cello.clue: large string instrument played with a bow while sitting

trombone.clue: brass instrument that uses a slide to change pitch

clarinet.clue: woodwind instrument with a single reed and a cylindrical bore

oboe.clue: woodwind instrument with a double reed and a haunting sound

baritone.clue: brass instrument similar to a small tuba or a type of saxophone

euphonium.clue: brass instrument that looks like a small tuba

percussion.clue: family of instruments played by striking or shaking

xylophone.clue: percussion instrument with wooden bars hit with mallets

vibraphone.clue: percussion instrument with metal bars and rotating fans

glockenspiel.clue: percussion instrument with metal bars and a bright sound

cymbal.clue: round brass plate used in percussion

tambourine.clue: small drum with metal jingles around the edge

gong.clue: large metal disc hit with a mallet for a deep sound

mandolin.clue: small string instrument with a pear-shaped body

bagpipes.clue: traditional Scottish wind instrument with a bag

harmonica.clue: small wind instrument played by blowing into slots

keyboard.clue: electronic instrument with keys like a piano

synthesizer.clue: electronic instrument that can mimic many sounds

organ.clue: keyboard instrument that uses pipes or electronics

lute.clue: old string instrument with a rounded body

dulcimer.clue: string instrument played by striking strings with hammers

zither.clue: string instrument with many strings stretched over a flat box

didgeridoo.clue: long wooden wind instrument from Australia

recorder.clue: simple woodwind instrument often taught in schools

kazoo.clue: small instrument that adds a buzzing quality to the voice

ocarina.clue: small ancient wind instrument often made of ceramic

bongo.clue: pair of small drums held between the knees

strings.clue: family of instruments that use stretched strings

wind.clue: family of instruments played by blowing air

woodwind.clue: family of wind instruments traditionally made of wood
